use_cases: Allow users to select emotional color states for mood tracking applications
Enable color preference selection in e-commerce product customization flows
Provide visual feedback collection for surveys and forms with color-coded emotion options
Support user preference settings for theming or accessibility color choices
ai_summary: A color-emotion dropdown select component built on shadcn/ui Select primitives. Renders color swatches alongside labels and optional emojis for visually intuitive emotion or color state selection. Designed for form integration with standard onChange handling and customizable placeholder text.
